title: Publish v0.5.29 release
outOfScope: Rewriting any existing public release tag or release object

sources.reason: Declares the next patch release tag.
Uses the new published default tag.

riskAssessment.reason: The new tag must be created only from merged main and exact-SHA workflow evidence.

executionDecision.reason: Release publication is explicitly deferred to the exact-SHA GitHub workflow after PR merge.

preReviewWarnings: Verify exact source SHA, tag target, release assets, smoke, and compatibility evidence.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: release.json and installer documentation declare v0.5.29.
Generated candidate evidence is internally consistent for the release source commit.
The merged main SHA passes required smoke and compatibility workflows.
The exact-SHA release workflow publishes and verifies v0.5.29.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: The completed remediation set needs a new immutable public release without changing v0.5.28.
constraints: Publish only from merged main through release.yml.
intent.rationale: Separate release preparation from exact-SHA post-merge publication and platform evidence.

scenarioCoverage.reason: Executed only by release.yml after this Work Item merges.
